# Count Registry Skill (Minimal)

**Source of Truth** — Entity counts computed from filesystem globs, never hard-coded in prose.

**Fixed Constants** — Platform LZs (4), Security Rules (6), CAF Areas (8), Golden Principles (10) are safe to state.

**Computed Counts** — Agents, skills, instructions, workflows must use descriptive language or live `ls | wc -l` counts.

**Canonical Phrases** — Use "the full skill catalog" or "specialized agents and subagents" instead of numbers.

Read `SKILL.md` or `SKILL.digest.md` for full content.
